series_metadata.series_description: These web pages are not maintained by the Chancellor of the Ohio Board of Regents (the “Chancellor”), but are maintained by a social media web page, for example, Facebook or Twitter. The Chancellor may regularly post information on these social media web pages. Records in this series may include, but are not limited to, general descriptive information about the Chancellor, press releases and articles that are of interest to the Chancellor. Information posted that falls under a separate retention schedule will be kept according to that retention schedule.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: on web page six months
